title: Eclipse Attacks
description: Eclipse attacks isolate a node from honest peers to manipulate its view of the network. Mitigation requires peer diversity, routing hygiene, and robust eviction policy.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts: eclipse-attacks
resources.notes: Operational lessons from node operators and researchers.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: P2P Network
resources.notes: Baseline peer-to-peer behavior needed to reason about eclipse vectors.
